title: taraxacum distinctum
intro: Taraxacum distinctum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is closely related to the more commonly known dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum distinctum lie in its roots and leaves, which are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Taraxacum distinctum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
